summary: All 4 CORS & Navigation hardening assertions passed. OutOfBlinkCors switch removed (VAL-CORS-001), will-navigate uses hostname-based URL parsing (VAL-CORS-002), setWindowOpenHandler uses hostname-based URL parsing (VAL-CORS-003), and hardcoded Chrome/120 UA replaced with dynamic Electron Chromium UA (VAL-CORS-004). No services needed — all validation done via shell grep and Node.js test scripts.
